title: Validating Responsiveness of AAV-DIO-hM3Dq-DREADD
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6q6ce","text":"To confirm responsiveness of AAV-DIO-hM3Dq-DREADD in DATIRESCre mice. Activation of DREADD receptors in dopamine neurons with CNO should induce a robust increase in locomotion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":56,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4pk2v","text":"DATIRESCre mice bilaterally injected in the midbrain with AAV-DIO-hM3Dq-DREADD","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":3,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ch2k","text":"Med Associates wireless activity wheels (ENV-047)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"baf0t","text":"Med Associates Hub (DIG-807)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"98j74","text":"Med Associates software (SOF-860)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fd0bd","text":"Clozapine-n-oxide (CNO; Tocris 4936-MTO)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cf62b","text":"Sterile saline","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mice should be at least two-weeks post-surgery.
Habituate mice to wireless running wheels in individually-housed cages.
See Victoria Vance, Katerina Rademacher, Ken Nakamura 2023. Behavior Tracking with Running Wheels. protocols.io https://protocols.io/view/behavior-tracking-with-running-wheels-cymrxu56
0.5mg/kg CNO dissolved in sterile saline, 500µL volume per mouse.
Prepared fresh the day of injection.
Note: All injections should be performed at the same time of day, at least 2–3 hours before the dark cycle.
Day 1: IP inject mice with 500µL of sterile saline.
Day 2: IP inject mice with 500µL CNO.
Day 3 or 4: IP inject mice again with 500µL CNO.
Responders increase their running wheel activity in the 10-60min following IP injection of CNO. Exclude mice that do not respond to IP CNO from further analysis.
creator: Haru Yamamoto
